device_name: Aquilion Prime SP (TSX-303B8) V10.2 with AiCE-i
intended_use: This device is indicated to acquire and display cross-sectional volumes of the whole body, to include the head. The Aquilion Prime SP has the capability to provide volume sets. These volume sets can b
intended_use_full: This device is indicated to acquire and display cross-sectional volumes of the whole body, to include the head. The Aquilion Prime SP has the capability to provide volume sets. These volume sets can be used to perform specialized studies, using indicated software/hardware, by a trained and qualified physician. AiCE (Advanced Intelligent Clear-IQ Engine) is a noise reduction algorithm that improves image quality and reduces image noise by employing Deep Convolutional Neural Network methods for abdomen, pelvis, lung, cardiac, extremities, head and inner ear applications.
ground_truth: Phantoms and diagnostic image review by American Board Certified Radiologist
other_metrics: Contrast-to-Noise Ratio (CNR), CT Number Accuracy, Uniformity, Slice Sensitivity Profile (SSP), Modulation Transfer Function (MTF)-Wire, Modulation Transfer Function (MTF)-Edge, Standard Deviation of Noise (SD), Noise Power Spectra (NPS), Low Contrast Detectability (LCD): 1.5 mm at 0.3%, 21.8mGy using AiCE Body; Dose reduction: 82% relative to FBP; Low contrast detectability improvement: 13.8% over AIDR 3D; Noise reduction: 21.4 at same dose for body compared to AIDR 3D
